---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the app is broken or behaving unexpectedly
labels: bug
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong and what you expected to happen.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Effect type / settings used
2. Data entered (paste CSV or minimal example)
3. What you clicked / did
4. What happened

**FOSMA version**
<!-- Check the About tab → version number and DOI, e.g. "v1.0.0 · 10.5281/zenodo.20470390" -->

**Browser and OS**
<!-- e.g. Chrome 124 on Windows 11 -->

**Screenshots or console errors**
<!-- Open DevTools (F12) → Console tab; paste any red errors here -->
